creator: ohartman@klima.physik.uni-mainz.de
text:
On Wed, 26 Dec 2001, Dirk Froemberg wrote:

Sorry.
Please close the PR. I got the solution for this well known problem.
I turned on options ENABLE_VFS_IOOPT in the kernel and this is
documented to be broken in -current and also in -stable as I now know.

Without this option enabled, cdrecord produces CDR's the right way.

:>How does this PR differ from 32909? Can one be closed?
:>
:>BTW. I doubt this is a general problem. But I'll look at it in detail...
:>

--
MfG
O. Hartmann
